title: Semiconductor device structure and method for forming the same
abstract: A semiconductor device structure is provided. The semiconductor device structure includes a substrate, a conductive feature on the substrate, and an electrical connection structure on the conductive feature. The electrical connection includes a first grain made of a first metal material, and a first inhibition layer made of a second metal layer that is different than the first metal material. The first inhibition layer extends vertically along a first side of a grain boundary of the first grain and laterally along a bottom of the grain boundary of the first grain.
claims: 1. A semiconductor device structure, comprising: a substrate; a conductive feature on the substrate; and an electrical connection structure on the conductive feature, wherein the electrical connection structure comprises: a first grain made of a first metal material; and a second metal material extending vertically along a first side of a grain boundary of the first grain and laterally along a bottom of the grain boundary of the first grain, wherein the second metal material is different than the first metal material.
